name: @jc4649/pi-toolcall-guard
description_en: Deterministic tool-call guard for pi: path preflight, schema/repair, content rules, error enrichment, and destructive-bash blocking (interactive confirm + headless subagent hard-block)
description_zh: pi 的确定性工具调用防护器：路径预检、模式/修复、内容规则、错误丰富化和破坏性 bash 阻塞（交互式确认 + 无头子代理硬阻塞）。
